dialogueChunks.intro: The mediation fell apart, {player_name}. One of the elite struck a worker during the talks. Now there's a mob forming.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is trying to hold back the workers from storming the estate, but they're furious. {quest_ally} found evidence that the powerful have been stockpiling weapons, anticipating this situation. {quest_item} contains records of how they've been siphoning community funds for years.
dialogueChunks.outro: If you can get {quest_item} to the neutral council before this turns violent, the evidence might force a real reckoning instead of a bloodbath.

dialogueChunks.intro: The workers tried to take back what was theirs by force. The guards repelled them and people were injured. The powerful doubled the guard.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} discovered that {quest_item}, the original founding agreement, specifies that no levies can be imposed without a community vote. The powerful have been violating their own legal authority. But the document is locked away in {location_hint}, and soldiers stand between us and the proof.
dialogueChunks.outro: Get the document to {quest_ally}. If the founding agreement is clear, even the guards will have to stand down. The law is on our side if we can put it in front of the right eyes.

dialogueChunks.intro: The powerful found out about the investigation. The person who gathered the evidence has been expelled and their workshop was ransacked.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} managed to hide copies of {quest_item} before the enforcers arrived. But the powerful are now threatening to blacklist anyone who supports the lower ranks. {quest_ally} says witnesses have already been pressured into withdrawing their testimony.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need to get the evidence to a neutral authority at {location_hint} before it's buried completely. {quest_item} proves the {quest_focus} was rigged for at least a decade. The {quest_threat} won't stop until everyone who knows is silenced.
